arts.ttl: Kean: Barcelona join Newcastle in transfer race, but Fiorentina send clear message
arts.sum: Fiorentina President Rocco Commisso insists he wants Moise Kean to stay, while Italian media claim...

VLOG | Atlético Madrid v Barça Copa del Rey semifinal second leg - FC Barcelona Copa del Rey final Clásico confirmed – the first since 2014 – as FC Barcelona win for the second time in two weeks at the Metropolitano stadium and they now have the chance to extend their record of 31-time winners of the trophy.

arts.ttl: ‘Absolutely no problem’ - Szczęsny talks Ter Stegen’s return
arts.sum: It’s not clear yet when he will be ready - but Szczesny shared his thoughts about the situation after the win over Atletico Madrid . “I want to help the team and do my best on the pitch, but if the coach decides that the team captain is coming back and defending, then for me it’s an understandable situation.”
Barcelona president Joan Laporta revealed that manager Hansi Flick has expressed concerns about the club's financial uncertainty going forward.

arts.ttl: Arsenal, Barcelona & Chelsea learn Nico Williams' salary demands
arts.sum: Nico Williams' wage demands could be a problem for Arsenal, Chelsea and Barcelona.

arts.ttl: Forget Haaland, Mbappé, Salah: Barcelona's Torres is Europe's most prolific forward
arts.sum: Barcelona's super-sub Ferran Torres currently boasts the best goals-per-minute return of any player in Europe's top five leagues this season.

arts.ttl: Liverpool 'eyeing shock summer transfer' as Barcelona star 'emerges as option' to replace Virgil van Dijk
arts.sum: Liverpool are reportedly considering a move for Barcelona centre-back Ronald Araujo during this summer's transfer window.
Real Madrid and Barcelona have pulled away from the chasing pack as we head into gameweek 30 and Alex Wrigley has predictions for all 10 games in LaLiga.

arts.ttl: Friday's Transfer Talk Update: Gabriel Magalhaes, Alejandro Balde, Diogo Dalot
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up the latest confirmed transfer news and speculation from across the footballing world.

arts.ttl: Deco includes La Masia talent in Barca’s left-back plans
arts.sum: Teenage defender Jofre Torrents is fast emerging as a possible option as he has been playing a starring role for Juliano Belletti’s Juvenil A team. Barcelona are thinking about full-back options ahead of the summer transfer window as they look to strengthen both positions.
